title: Nika Turns the Battle
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kizaru, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Vegapunk as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The Holy Land of Mary Geoise

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This? Why it's the answer to everyone's dreams, vega-coffee!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With just a drop of it, you can transform...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A mug of water into a warm, delicious brew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So, how many minutes did that kill?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It wasn't exactly a strict deadline, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if they try to silence our broadcast,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That amount of extra time won't be long enough to stop us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gotta let Nami-San and the others know!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
